rows.label: qev050602_MSG0001
rows.name: ...You've come.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0002
rows.name:
Phew... Let's see... Before the mock
battle, would you mind listening to
a little story about us siblings?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050602_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod silently.

rows.label: qev050602_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050602_SEL0021
rows.name:
Urge him to fight, stating you should
decide who is superior right away.

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0003
rows.name:
The day the Larsian base in the Black Steel Continent
was attacked by the Queen Hastara... Originally, we
Sankesshu were supposed to be on defense duty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0004
rows.name:
However, we received orders from
the Growth and were forced to leave
the base to attack the aliens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0005
rows.name:
Our opponents weren't just soldiers...
We had to slaughter defenseless civilians
as well. It was a vile task.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0006
rows.name:
When we returned to the base after finishing that... lowest of
tasks, my parents who were supposed to be there, the General's
sons, everyone was nothing but remains eaten by that thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0007
rows.name:
At that moment, we siblings thought... That
the atrocious deeds we committed had come back
to exact a toll on our innocent families.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0008
rows.name:
That's why, for this battle alone... We
have to be the ones to do it. That is the
vow we siblings made to each other.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0009
rows.name:
...I am sorry, but I am going to have
you suffer a slight injury here so
that you withdraw from our battle![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0010
rows.name:
Heh heh, you are quite the straightforward
warrior, much like Da Zeulbe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0011
rows.name:
I don't dislike that spirit...
Then, let's dispense with the
idle chatter and duel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0012
rows.name:
Do not worry, I will not take your
life... But... I am going to have
you withdraw from our battle here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0013
rows.name:
Here I come... Da Girhi!
Da Zeulbe! Are you ready![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0014
rows.name:
You bet! Faster and fiercer than
lightning! I'll strike them down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0015
rows.name:
With a blow that shatters
boulders, I'll crush anyone
who gets close! Now, Brother!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050602_MSG0016
rows.name:
I will toy with them using movements swifter than
a gale! There is no enemy the Larsian Sankesshu
cannot defeat! Let us duel... fair and square![ST:wait ]
